options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -all
options.description: Shows data for all specified models.

options.name: -committed
options.description: Reports attributes of committed models only.

options.name: -create_area_per_gate
options.description: Reports the specified area per gate value.

options.name: -create_extra_macro
options.description: Reports the specified additional macros.

options.name: -create_gate_area
options.description: Reports the specified gate area value.

options.name: -create_gate_count
options.description: Reports the specified gate count value.

options.name: -create_optimize_effort
options.description: Disabling/enabling optimization with different effort.

options.name: -create_total_area
options.description: Reports the total area value.

options.name: -exclude
options.description: Excludes specified option.

options.name: -file
options.description: Specifies output file name.

options.name: -flexfiller_route_blockage
options.description: Reports percentages of flexFiller route blockage.

options.name: -flip_table
options.description: Flip the table output (rows to columns).

options.name: -include_default
options.description: Output default values (in parenthesis).

options.name: -model
options.description: Reports attributes of specified model.

options.name: -name
options.description: Reports model name only.

options.name: -planDesign_target_util
options.description: Reports target utilization value that will be used by planDesign.

options.name: -source_match
options.description: Specifies source type for reporting. Default is {user auto}

options.name: -tcl
options.description: Reports models as TCL list. Default is table print.

options.name: -type
options.description: Reports model type.

options.name: -type_match
options.description: {flex_module flex_instgroup} Specify the type match for reporting. Default is {flex_module}
